title: fragaria viridis var. alpina
intro: Fragaria viridis var. alpina, also known as the Alpine Green Strawberry or Wild Strawberry, is a type of strawberry plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Fragaria viridis var. alpina include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and protecting against cell damage. Fragaria viridis var. alpina can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
